technical.body: AGI clause killed, Microsoft license becomes non-exclusive through 2032, revenue share capped 2030, OpenAI cleared to sell across all clouds (AWS $38B already signed) — — Decade-long "AGI clause" (which would have voided Microsoft's IP rights once OpenAI's board declared AGI) is gone. Revenue-share payments stop in 2030 regardless of AGI status. Microsoft's ~$135B / 27% economic stake is intact, but exclusivity ends — OpenAI now ships its full product line on AWS, Oracle, Google. AWS deal reportedly $38B over seven years with $50B headroom. — Direct catalyst for hyperscaler-AI-lab cap-table coupling thesis — ahead of Mag 7 prints. — ****

technical.lead: Mag 7 super-week Apr 28-30 + FOMC Apr 28-29 (Powell's last meeting)
technical.body: Microsoft/Alphabet/Amazon/Meta on Apr 29, Apple Apr 30, ~$700B combined 2026 AI capex, rates held at 3.50-3.75% (consensus 100%) — — Microsoft EPS $4.04 / rev $81.4B / Azure +38% expected; Alphabet EPS $2.64 / rev $92.2B / FY26 capex $175B-$185B reaffirm watch; Meta EPS $7.51 / rev $55.5B (+31% YoY); Amazon AWS $200B AI plan. NVDA +4% Apr 27 to fresh 52-week high; AMD hit ATH $352.99 Apr 24 ahead of May 5 print. WTI +2.09% to $96.37, Brent +2.75% to $108.23 on Hormuz escalation. Iran floated new US proposal to reopen Strait. — FOMC is Powell's last meeting — — Warsh Senate hearing Apr 21; Powell term ends May 15. — ****

technical.lead: Totolink A8000RU CVE wave (CVE-2026-7153 / 7154 / 7156 / 7202, all CVSS 9.8, Apr 27-28) + Cisco ISE unauth-RCE advisory + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 still unpatched into Apr 28
technical.body: Four critical OS-command-injection CVEs against Totolink A8000RU firmware 7.1cu.643_b20200521 published in 48h — (Apr 27 7153/7154/7156, Apr 28 7202), all with public PoCs and unauthenticated remote attack paths. — Cisco ISE Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution Advisory** (cisco-sa-ise-unauth-rce-ZAd2GnJ6) lands same window. SGLang's GGUF SSTI primitive **still has no upstream patch** — v0.5.10 ships without `ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` mitigation. **Google + Forcepoint indirect-prompt-injection in-the-wild reports** (Apr 24-27) document 10 new IPI payloads targeting agentic finance/data flows; OpenAI publicly concedes prompt-injection is permanent.******

citations.label: TheHackerWire - Totolink A8000RU OS Command Injection (CVE-2026-7202)

technical.lead: AWS × Anthropic Apr 27 deepens to Trainium/Graviton silicon + Claude Cowork in Bedrock; AWS × Meta Graviton-at-scale deal
technical.body: AgentCore CLI 14-region GA, managed-harness 4-region preview — — Anthropic training most-advanced foundation models on — AWS Trainium + Graviton — , co-engineering at silicon level with Annapurna Labs against the $5B-$33B / $100B 10-year compute commit. — Claude Cowork lands in Bedrock** (data-resident inside AWS); a "Claude Platform on AWS" unified dev surface follows. **Meta deploying tens of millions of Graviton cores** for CPU-intensive agentic-AI workloads. AgentCore managed-harness-preview lifts model-agnostic agent loop with per-session microVM, mid-session model swap, filesystem persistence; CLI runs CDK today, Terraform soon; Skills available on Kiro Power, Claude Code/Codex/Cursor next week.******

citations.label: AWS Blog - AWS Weekly Roundup: Anthropic & Meta partnership, AWS Lambda S3 Files, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore CLI

technical.lead: AI Dev 26 x SF opens today (Apr 28) at Pier 48 with 3,000+ devs, Andrew Ng-hosted; FOMC + Mag 7 prints converge into the same 48h tape; Microsoft VibeVoice frontier-voice OSS surfaces Apr 27
technical.body: DeepLearning.AI two-day SF flagship runs Apr 28-29 with tracks on — Agentic AI, Context Engineering, Multimodal AI Apps, AI Governance, Coding-with-AI — + AI Startup Track. Stanford Causal Science: Frontiers in AI Evaluation Apr 29; SaaStr Annual May 12-14; AI DevSummit May 27-28. Apr 27 OSS landing: — Microsoft VibeVoice** (MIT-licensed Whisper-style STT with built-in speaker diarization, 50+ languages) and Apr 28 **`talkie-1930-13b-base`** from Nick Levine / David Duvenaud / Alec Radford (13B trained on 260B pre-1931 tokens — "vintage" language model).******
